languages.text: Элементы не восприимчивы к токсичному урону, телепатии (абилкам Psychic Shriek и Psychic Assault ), многим эффектам контроля (Prone, Immobilised, Stunned, Cannot Attack, Psychosomatic Trauma, Blinded, Psy Dampening, Slowed, Staggered, Perplexed) и принудительного перемещения (абилки Notch of Purpose, Point of Curiosity, Zone of Fear), а так же ДоТам (Кровотечению и Отравлению).

traits.locale_text: Элементы не восприимчивы к токсичному урону, телепатии (абилкам Psychic Shriek и Psychic Assault ), многим эффектам контроля (Prone, Immobilised, Stunned, Cannot Attack, Psychosomatic Trauma, Blinded, Psy Dampening, Slowed, Staggered, Perplexed) и принудительного перемещения (абилки Notch of Purpose, Point of Curiosity, Zone of Fear), а так же ДоТам (Кровотечению и Отравлению).

languages.text: Каждая часть единого организма невосприимчива к токсичному урону, телепатическим силам (например, способностям {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Пси-визг{/g} и {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Пси-атака{/g}), к ряду эффектов контроля ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокидывание{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиживание{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}неспособность атаковать{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}ослепление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}пси-подавление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}замедление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломление{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательство{/g}), эффектам принудительного перемещения (например, способностям {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Целеустремленность{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Точка любопытства{/g} и {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Область страха{/g}), а также некоторым эффектам периодического урона ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g}).
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: Каждая часть единого организма невосприимчива к {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}токсичному урону{/g}, телепатическим силам (например, способностям {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Пси-визг{/g} и {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Пси-атака{/g}), к ряду эффектов контроля ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокидывание{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиживание{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}неспособность атаковать{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}ослепление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}пси-подавление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}замедление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломление{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательство{/g}), эффектам принудительного перемещения (например, способностям {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Целеустремленность{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Точка любопытства{/g} и {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Область страха{/g}), а также некоторым эффектам периодического урона ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g}).

Каждая часть единого организма невосприимчива к {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}токсичному урону{/g}, телепатическим силам (например, способностям {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Пси-визг{/g} и {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Пси-атака{/g}), к ряду эффектов контроля ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокидывание{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиживание{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}неспособность атаковать{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}ослепление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}пси-подавление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}замедление{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломление{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательство{/g}), эффектам принудительного перемещения (например, способностям {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Целеустремленность{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Точка любопытства{/g} и {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Область страха{/g}), а также некоторым эффектам периодического урона ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g}).

languages.text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|f:8de915da52f24d9bb925d13fb2c8cf98}prone{/g}, {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:PsychosomaticTraumaEffect}psychosomatic trauma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g} and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|f:8de915da52f24d9bb925d13fb2c8cf98}prone{/g}, {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:PsychosomaticTraumaEffect}psychosomatic trauma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}ZOne of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects (prone, immobilised, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:PsychosomaticTraumaEffect}psychosomatic trauma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}ZOne of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

languages.text: Les membres de la créature sont insensibles aux dégâts toxiques, aux pouvoirs télépathiques (capacités {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Cri psychique{/g} et {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Assaut psychique{/g}), à de nombreux effets de contrôle ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Immobilisation{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}Attaque impossible{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}Aveuglement{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}Affaiblissement psy{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}Ralentissement{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexité{/g}), aux effets de déplacement forcé (par exemple, capacités {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Marque de résolution{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Dose de curiosité{/g} et {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone d'effroi{/g}) et à certains effets de dégâts progressifs ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g}).
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: Les membres de la créature sont insensibles aux dégâts toxiques, aux pouvoirs télépathiques (capacités {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Cri psychique{/g} et {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Assaut psychique{/g}), à de nombreux effets de contrôle (Paralysie, Immobilisation, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}Attaque impossible{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}Aveuglement{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}Affaiblissement psy{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}Ralentissement{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexité{/g}), aux effets de déplacement forcé (par exemple, capacités {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Marque de résolution{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Dose de curiosité{/g} et {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone d'effroi{/g}) et à certains effets de dégâts progressifs ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g}).

languages.text: Yaratığın kısımları toksik hasara, telepatik güçlere ({g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Ruhsezi Çığlığı{/g} ve {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Ruhsezi Taarruzu{/g} kabiliyetleri), çeşitli kontrol etkilerine ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilme{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}saldıramama{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}körleşme{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}ruhsezi körelmesi{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlama{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallama{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g}), zorunlu hareket etkilerine (örneğin {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Çekim Noktası{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Merak Uyandıran Nokta{/g} ve {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Korku Bölgesi{/g} kabiliyetleri) ve bazı zamanla hasar veren etkilere ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanama{/g}) karşı bağışıktır.
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: Yaratığın kısımları toksik hasara, telepatik güçlere ({g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Ruhsezi Çığlığı{/g} ve {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Ruhsezi Taarruzu{/g} kabiliyetleri), çeşitli kontrol etkilerine (yere devrilme, felç, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}saldıramama{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}körleşme{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}ruhsezi körelmesi{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlama{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallama{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g}), zorunlu hareket etkilerine (örneğin {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Çekim Noktası{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Merak Uyandıran Nokta{/g} ve {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Korku Bölgesi{/g} kabiliyetleri) ve bazı zamanla hasar veren etkilere ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanama{/g}) karşı bağışıktır.

languages.text: 该生物的各部分免疫毒素伤害、心灵感应能力（{g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}灵能狂啸{/g}和{g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}灵能猛袭{/g}能力）、多种控制效果（{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}无法攻击{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}致盲{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}灵能抑制{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}减速{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}）、强制位移效果（如{g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}目标切口{/g}、{g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}好奇之所{/g}和{g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}恐惧之域{/g}能力），以及一些持续伤害效果（{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}）。
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: 该生物的各部分免疫毒素伤害、心灵感应能力（{g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}灵能狂啸{/g}和{g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}灵能猛袭{/g}能力）、多种控制效果（倒地、定身、{g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}无法攻击{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}致盲{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}灵能抑制{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}减速{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}）、强制位移效果（如{g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}目标切口{/g}、{g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}好奇之所{/g}和{g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}恐惧之域{/g}能力），以及一些持续伤害效果（{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}）。

languages.text: Las distintas partes de esta criatura son inmunes al daño tóxico, los poderes telepáticos (las capacidades {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Grito psíquico{/g} y {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Asalto psíquico{/g}), a múltiples efectos de control ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}no puede atacar{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}cegado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}amortiguación psíquica{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralentizado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado {/g}y {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g}), a los efectos de movimiento obligatorio (por ejemplo las capacidades {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Muesca de propósito{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Señal de curiosidad{/g} y {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zona de miedo{/g}), así como a ciertos efectos de daño continuado ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g}).
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: Las distintas partes de esta criatura son inmunes al daño tóxico, los poderes telepáticos (las capacidades {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Grito psíquico{/g} y {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Asalto psíquico{/g}), a múltiples efectos de control (derribado, inmovilizado, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}no puede atacar{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}cegado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}amortiguación psíquica{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralentizado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado {/g}y {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g}), a los efectos de movimiento obligatorio (por ejemplo las capacidades {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Muesca de propósito{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Señal de curiosidad{/g} y {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zona de miedo{/g}), así como a ciertos efectos de daño continuado ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g}).

languages.text: Die Teile der Kreatur sind immun gegen Giftschaden, telepathische Kräfte (die Fähigkeiten {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psionischer Schrei{/g} sowie {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psionischer Angriff{/g}), verschiedene Kontrolleffekte ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Hingestreckt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Gelähmt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}Kann nicht angreifen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}Geblendet{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}Psidämpfer{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}Verlangsamt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Überrascht{/g}), erzwungene Bewegungseffekte (beispielsweise die Fähigkeiten {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Einschnitt der Bestimmung{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Punkt der Neugierde{/g} und {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone der Furcht{/g}) und einige Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekte ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g}).
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: Die Teile der Kreatur sind immun gegen Giftschaden, telepathische Kräfte (die Fähigkeiten {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psionischer Schrei{/g} sowie {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psionischer Angriff{/g}), verschiedene Kontrolleffekte (Hingestreckt, Gelähmt, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}Kann nicht angreifen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:, BlindedEffect}Geblendet{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}Psidämpfer{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}Verlangsamt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Überrascht{/g}), erzwungene Bewegungseffekte (beispielsweise die Fähigkeiten {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Einschnitt der Bestimmung{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Punkt der Neugierde{/g} und {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone der Furcht{/g}) und einige Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekte ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g}).

languages.text: この生き物は、毒によるダメージ、テレパシー能力（{g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}サイキック・シュリーク{/g}と{g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}サイキック・アサルト{/g}）、複数のコントロール効果（仰向け、拘束、{g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}攻撃不能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}視界不良{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}精神麻痺{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}遅延{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}混乱{/g}）、強制移動効果（例えば、{g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}ノッチ・オブ・パープス{/g}、{g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}ポイント・オブ・カリアスティー{/g}、{g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}ゾーン・オブ・フィア{/g}）、そしていくつかの時間経過によるダメージ効果（{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}）に耐性があります。
languages.original_text: The parts of the creature are immune to toxic damage, telepathic powers (the {g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}Psychic Shriek{/g} and {g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}Psychic Assault{/g} abilities), multiple control effects (prone, immobilised, {g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}cannot attack{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}psy dampening{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}), forced movement effects (for example, the {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities), as well as some damage-over-time effects ({g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}).

traits.locale_text: この生き物は、毒によるダメージ、テレパシー能力（{g|f:fa305ba4e2aa48f394608d1ccfc6d385}サイキック・シュリーク{/g}と{g|f:87be0b4299564f34802f8b339bba05fd}サイキック・アサルト{/g}）、複数のコントロール効果（仰向け、拘束、{g|Encyclopedia:CantAttackEffect}攻撃不能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}視界不良{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:CalmedWarpEffect}精神麻痺{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}遅延{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}混乱{/g}）、強制移動効果（例えば、{g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}ノッチ・オブ・パープス{/g}、{g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}ポイント・オブ・カリアスティー{/g}、{g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}ゾーン・オブ・フィア{/g}）、そしていくつかの時間経過によるダメージ効果（{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}）に耐性があります。
